dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7859 IH: Welcoming International Success Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Watson Coleman (for herself, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Ms. Clarke of New York, Mr. Moulton, and Ms. Lois Frankel of Florida) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To provide that the Proclamation entitled, Restriction On Entry Of Certain Nonimmigrant Workers shall have no force or effect.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Welcoming International Success Act.

section.header: No force and effect for proclamation relating to H-1B visas and wage levels
section.text: The Proclamation entitled, Restriction On Entry Of Certain Nonimmigrant Workers and issued on September 19, 2025, shall have no force or effect and no Federal funds may be obligated or expended to carry out such Proclamation.
